chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ الْمُقَامِ بِالْمَدِينَةِ وَ الصَّوْمِ وَ الِاعْتِكَافِ عِنْدَ الْأَسَاطِينِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 219 – Merits of the staying in Al-Medina, and the Fasting, and I’tikaaf (seclusion) by the pillars (of the Masjid of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/270)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/270)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) أَيُّمَا أَفْضَلُ الْمُقَامُ بِمَكَّةَ أَوْ بِالْمَدِينَةِ فَقَالَ أَيَّ شَيْ‏ءٍ تَقُولُ أَنْتَ قَالَ فَقُلْتُ وَ مَا قَوْلِي مَعَ قَوْلِكَ قَالَ إِنَّ قَوْلَكَ يَرُدُّكَ إِلَى قَوْلِي قَالَ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ أَمَّا أَنَا فَأَزْعُمُ أَنَّ الْمُقَامَ بِالْمَدِينَةِ أَفْضَلُ مِنَ الْمُقَامِ بِمَكَّةَ قَالَ فَقَالَ أَمَا لَئِنْ قُلْتَ ذَلِكَ لَقَدْ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) ذَاكَ يَوْمَ فِطْرٍ وَ جَاءَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَسَلَّمَ عَلَيْهِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ ثُمَّ قَالَ قَدْ فَضَلْنَا النَّاسَ الْيَوْمَ بِسَلَامِنَا عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Al Hassan Bin Jahm who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Which of the two is superior, the staying in Makkah or in Al-Medina?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Which thing are you saying?’ So I said, ‘And what is my word (compared) with your<sup>asws</sup> word?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Your words would return you to my<sup>asws</sup> words’. So I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I claim that the staying in Al-Medina is superior than staying in Al-Makkah’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But, although you said that, Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said that (as well) on the day of Fitr, and he<sup>asws</sup> went over to Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> greeted to him<sup>saww</sup> in the Masjid, then said: ‘We<sup>asws</sup> have been preferred over the people today by our<sup>asws</sup> sending greetings upon Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from al-Hassan ibn Jahm who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Is staying in Makkah more virtuous or in al- Madinah?’ He (the Imam) asked, ‘What do you say about it?’ I (the narrator) replied, ‘My words are not of any significance before your words.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Your words return you to my words.’ I (the narrator) then said, ‘I believe staying in al-Madinah is more virtuous than in Makkah.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘What you said is the same as what abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said on a day of ‘Id al-Fitr during his visit of the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause. He offered his al-Salam in the Masjid and said, ‘We today have been given preference over people due to our offering al-Salam to the Messenger of Allah.’”
